prompt: Remove the outter border, then enlarge the remaining image to fill the output. KEEP EVERY DETAIL.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a mosaic artwork. Remove the distinct mosaic border that frames the central scene on all four sides. This border is characterized by dark blue semicircles and gold tesserae. After removing the border, enlarge the remaining central mosaic image to fill the entire output space, maintaining all original details and the aspect ratio of the artwork.
objects: Distinct mosaic border (should not be present)
